name: Dropbox Sign — Send for Signature
description: Send a document to one or more signers via Dropbox Sign (HelloSign). The task completes immediately after sending; use an Intermediate Message Catch Event (message: signature.completed) to wait for all signatures.

properties.label: API Key
properties.description: Dropbox Sign API key. Use a secret reference: {{secrets.DROPBOX_SIGN_API_KEY}}

properties.label: Document Source
properties.description: How to provide the document to sign

properties.label: Document Variable
properties.description: Process variable containing the uploaded file (StoredFile object or R2 key string). E.g. = contractFile

properties.label: Template ID
properties.description: Dropbox Sign template ID (if using a pre-built template instead of an uploaded document)

properties.label: Signers
properties.description: FEEL array of signers. E.g. = [{name: clientName, email: clientEmail}]

properties.label: Email Subject
properties.description: Subject line of the signing invitation email. FEEL supported.

properties.label: Email Message
properties.description: Optional message body shown to signers. FEEL supported.

properties.label: Message Name
properties.description: Must match the message name on the Intermediate Message Catch Event that waits for the signature.

properties.label: Signature Request ID Variable
properties.description: Process variable name where the Dropbox Sign request ID is stored. The Intermediate Catch Event must correlate on this field.

properties.label: Test Mode
properties.description: When enabled, Dropbox Sign sends to sandbox only (no real emails sent). Disable in production.

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retry attempts on API failure
